chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3885 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 31.01.2025 Mr. Hamza Waheed, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Solangi, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Counsel for the department submits that in view of the Federal Board of Revenue’s notification dated 02.02.2023, jurisdiction of Commissioner Inland Revenue, LTO has been re-determined. In view hereof, he states that the impugned notice shall be recalled by the department. The department shall remain at liberty to issue afresh notice if permissible under the law. In view hereof, petitioner’s counsel states that petition be disposed of in view of the foregoing. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
